Interface ITerrainAsciiDataImporter2

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to members that handle importing terrain source data in ASCII format.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("33F2E5C8-8E0E-4FC2-8B7B-D901C6E90ED8")]
public interface ITerrainAsciiDataImporter2 : ITerrainAsciiDataImporter, ITerrainDataImporter

Properties

DecimalPointType

ASCII data decimal point type.

esriTerrainDecimalSeparatorType DecimalPointType { get; set; }

Property Value

esriTerrainDecimalSeparatorType
